nodes.name: 布宜诺斯艾利斯省
nodes.summary: 布宜诺斯艾利斯省是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联30种鸟类，包括棕头草雁、Red-and-white crake、查科林鴞等30种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 库斯科大区
nodes.summary: 库斯科大区是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联45种鸟类，包括高山斑䳍、闪羽蜂鸟、秘鲁斑尾蜂鸟等45种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 卡哈马卡大区

nodes.name: 棕顶蚁鵙
nodes.summary: 棕顶蚁鵙（Rufous-capped antshrike，学名 Thamnophilus ruficapillus），在图谱中标记为无危（LC）物种，已关联19个分布地点节点，常见栖息地包括灌丛、山地森林。

nodes.name: 巴西
nodes.summary: 巴西是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联854种鸟类，包括大美洲鸵、侏䳍、白腹拟䳍等854种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: LC

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: The subspecies are found thus: *Thamnophilus ruficapillus jaczewskii: Andes of northern Peru in the departments of Cajamarca, Amazonas, and San Martín *Thamnophilus ruficapillus marcapatae: eastern slope of the Andes of southern Peru in Cuzco and Puno departments *Thamnophilus ruficapillus subfasciatus: eastern slope of the Andes of northwestern Bolivia's La Paz and western Cochabamba departments *Thamnophilus ruficapillus cochabambae: eastern slope of the Andes from eastern Cochabamba in Bolivia southeast through Santa Cruz Department into northwestern Argentina as far as Tucumán Province *Thamnophilus ruficapillus ruficapillus: southeastern Brazil from eastern Minas Gerais and Espírito Santo south and west into eastern Paraguay, northeastern Argentina as far as Buenos Aires Province, and Uruguay The rufous-capped antshrike inhabits a variety of landscapes that differ geographically
